creator: steve@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

No port installs host.def anymore except one and sf@freebsd.org is 
going to fix that one.  This is a problem where the old open-motif 
port used to include its own host.def.  It doesn't anymore and there's 
really nothing that I can think that can be changed in this port 
to help.  I'm open to patches however if anyone else can. :)
